items.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
items.summary: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

items.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
items.summary: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.

items.title: Italy's famed Uffizi admits cyber-attack but denies security breach
items.summary: Hackers were reported to have infiltrated IT systems - but the gallery says its works are safe.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美軍F-15戰機於伊朗境內遭擊落 搜救任務進行中
items.summary: 兩名美國官員證實，一架雙座F-15戰機於伊朗境內墜毀，美方正於3日展開搜救任務。這起事件為自開戰以來，首次有美軍戰機在伊朗上空折損，引發外界高度關注。  　不具名美方官員...…

items.title: 日本散步不用怕熊出沒！永旺超市內闢健行步道
items.summary: 時序入春，日本民眾既期待櫻花盛開美景，又擔心結束冬眠的熊開始出沒。對此，去年有近500起熊出沒事件的宮城縣栗原市當局與商家合作，讓民眾能在無須擔心天氣也不怕熊出沒的情況下，在貨...…

items.title: 重創伊朗武器製造能力 以色列總理：已摧毀70％鋼鐵產能
items.summary: 以色列總理納坦雅胡今天表示，以色列對伊朗的打擊已將其鋼鐵產能摧毀約70％，使其武器製造能力大受影響。  法新社報導，納坦雅胡（Benjamin Netanyahu）透過影片聲明表示：「我...…
